message:
Fix JSON5 unquoted key cross-chunk boundary bug and test API calls

- Add cross-chunk accumulation for JSON5 unquoted keys in both ptScan
  and spScan: when an identifier key spans a feed() boundary, the partial
  key is accumulated and finalized when a non-ident character arrives
- Fix all security tests that used createParser(undefined, {format: ...})
  instead of createParser({format: ...}) — second arg was silently ignored
- Fix assertEqual assertions for Infinity (JSON.stringify can't distinguish
  null from Infinity — use assert with === instead)
- Fix EventParser test: use ep.on() not ep.subscribe(), path "*" not "$.*"
- Update Infinity tape export test: with correct format, tape IS exported
